memberdef.name: AccCf64Type
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "accumulator.AccCf64", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AccCf64Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AccCf64_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "AccCf64 type.", .tp_methods = AccCf64_methods, .tp_new = AccCf64_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AccCf64_init, }
